title: Rich Savory Chinese Chicken Noodles
description: A comforting and winey Sichuan dish featuring chicken stock concentrate, slow-cooked to perfection, with a flaky texture and savory flavor, this dish is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until lightly browned.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken stock concentrate, soy sauce, and Shaoxing wine, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
While the chicken is cooking, cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
Once the chicken is cooked, shred it into bite-sized pieces and add it to the noodles.
Stir in the chopped scallions and serve hot.
